population: Players with >= 100 DE, 100 DL total snaps, min 6 games

sacks_per_game_z.how: From player_stats. Per-stint sacks / per-stint games.

qb_hits_per_game_z.what: QB hits per game (sack + non-sack pressure that contacted the QB).

pressure_rate_z.what: Pressures per pass play defended while on the field.
pressure_rate_z.how: PFR pressures / estimated pass plays defended (team pass plays × this player's defensive snap share).
pressure_rate_z.limits: Snap-share approximation; not a true PFF/NGS pass-rush snap denominator.

solo_tackle_rate_z.what: Solo tackles as a share of total tackles.
solo_tackle_rate_z.limits: Scorekeeper subjectivity on solo vs assist.

passes_defended_per_game_z.what: Passes broken up per game (DE deflections at the line + pass coverage on swings).
passes_defended_per_game_z.limits: Edge defenders see fewer of these than DBs.

interceptions_per_game_z.limits: Even rarer than forced fumbles for edge players.

pressures_per_game_z.what: Total pressures per game (sacks + hits + hurries).
pressures_per_game_z.limits: PFR's chart, not PFF's. Methods differ slightly between sources.

hurries_per_game_z.what: Hurries per game (pressure that didn't sack or knock down).
hurries_per_game_z.limits: Subset of total pressures. Sometimes overlaps with hits.

qb_knockdowns_per_game_z.what: QB knockdowns per game (got the QB to the ground without a sack).
qb_knockdowns_per_game_z.limits: Different from QB hits in nflverse player_stats.

missed_tackle_pct_z.what: % of tackle attempts that were missed. Lower is better — z-score is INVERTED so higher z = more reliable tackler.
missed_tackle_pct_z.how: PFR missed_tackle_pct, then z-scored with sign flipped so positive = good.
missed_tackle_pct_z.limits: PFR's charting subjectivity; not always the same as PFF's missed tackle count.
